title: monotagma dolosum
intro: Monotagma dolosum is a species of flowering plant in the family Marantaceae, commonly known as the arrowroot or sago palm. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of wounds and skin conditions such as eczema and dermatitis, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Monotagma dolosum include its ability to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and soothe skin irritations. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by boiling the roots and leaves in water, which can then be applied topically as a poultice or taken internally as a tea to reap its medicinal benefits.
